title: Horizon of Apollo
meaning_summary: Horizon of Apollo keeps earning because its melodic ambient arc works both as active listening and as highly reusable focus music.
revenue_drivers: Ambient playlist usage keeps the track in steady specialist circulation.
The track benefits from repeat listening in work, study, and reflective contexts.
Long-tail catalog listening sustains revenue even without mainstream hit behavior.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes durable ambient streaming, creator-side participation, and modest but stable editorial and algorithmic playlist support.

ownership.notes: Modeled as a specialist ambient track with steady long-tail economics rather than event-driven revenue spikes.
